content_type.description: The content type of the secret, such as 'password' or 'application/x-pkcs12'.

expiration_date.description: Key not usable after the provided UTC datetime (Y-m-d'T'H:M:S'Z').

key_vault_id.description: The id of the Key Vault Key.

not_before_date.description: Key not usable before the provided UTC datetime (Y-m-d'T'H:M:S'Z').

secret_name.description: The name of the secret to create

secret_value.description: The value of the secret to store in the Key Vault

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.
